title: Compiler: Building the Composer PHAR
interaction_flow: Compiler → ProcessExecutor: execute(command, output, repoDir) → get commit hash → set $this->version
Compiler → ProcessExecutor: execute(command, output, repoDir) → get commit date → set $this->versionDate
Compiler → ProcessExecutor: execute(['git','describe','--tags','--exact-match','HEAD']) [alt: use tag as version OR read branch-alias from composer.json via JsonFile::read()]
--- Add Composer sources (*.php, excludes Compiler.php / ClassLoader.php / InstalledVersions.php) ---
Compiler → Compiler: addFile(phar, file, strip=true) [loop over finder results]
Compiler → CaBundle: getBundledCaBundlePath() [to build extraFiles list]
Compiler → Compiler: addFile(phar, file, strip=true|false based on .php extension) [loop over vendor finder]
Compiler → Compiler: addComposerBin(phar) → reads bin/composer, strips shebang, phar.addFromString('bin/composer', content)
Compiler → Timestamps: save(pharFile, SHA512) [re-sign with reproducible timestamp]
addFile_internals: if strip=true → stripWhitespace(content) [removes comments/whitespace via token_get_all, preserves line numbers]
if file=='LICENSE' → wrap content with newlines
if path=='src/Composer/Composer.php' → replace @package_version@, @package_branch_alias_version@, @release_date@ tokens; blank SOURCE_VERSION
getStub_internals: Returns PHP heredoc string with shebang + APC check + Phar availability check + Phar::mapPhar('composer.phar')
If version is a dev hash (hex-only), appends define('COMPOSER_DEV_WARNING_TIME', now+60days)
key_relationships: Compiler depends_on JsonFile (read branch-alias from composer.json)
Compiler depends_on CaBundle (get CA bundle path for extra-files list)
Compiler depends_on Phar (PHP built-in, archive creation)
Compiler depends_on Linter (PHP syntax validation of built PHAR)
Compiler depends_on Preg (regex operations in stripWhitespace and addComposerBin)
error_conditions: UnexpectedValueException if version is empty string after detection
RuntimeException if any expected extra file is missing from filesystem
RuntimeException if unexpected non-PHP/LICENSE files appear in vendor scan
important_notes: Three distinct Finder passes: (1) src/Composer PHP files with stripping, (2) res/ resources without stripping, (3) vendor/ with conditional stripping. ClassLoader.php and InstalledVersions.php are added separately without stripping to preserve docblocks. After phar is written+closed, Timestamps re-signs it for reproducibility. Linter validates final PHAR. Version is either a git tag or a commit hash; branch-alias is read from composer.json only for dev builds.
